case_title: MICHAEL LOTFY ET AL VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES (TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AND REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INC) HEARING SET FOR JUN-23-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED JUL-29-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NA, BYUNG JOON

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY LOTFY, MICHAEL NA, BYUNG JOON AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES (TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AND REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INC) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO AUG-17-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JACKY LOPEZ--TRINITY CORP. MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $767.21 FILED BY TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES (TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AND REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INC) AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LOTFY, MICHAEL NA, BYUNG JOON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS MICHAEL LOTFY & JOON BYUNG NA, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE JACKY LOPEZ, CORPORATE LEGAL MANAGER FOR TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOTFY, MICHAEL NA, BYUNG JOON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES (TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AND REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INC) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES (TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AND REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INC) RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LOTFY, MICHAEL NA, BYUNG JOON $767.21 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $917.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LOTFY, MICHAEL NA, BYUNG JOON

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES (TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AND REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INC)

EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: ERIN GARDERE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOTFY, MICHAEL NA, BYUNG JOON AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES (TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AND REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INC)
